import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'; import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, X, Lock, Eye, Play, Shield, Gavel } from 'lucide-react'; interface CaseData { title: string; caseNumber: string; leftPage: string; rightPage: string; } const ScenarioSimulation: React.FC = () => { const [opened, setOpened] = useState(false); const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(0); const [isFlipping, setIsFlipping] = useState(false); const [rotation, setRotation] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 }); const [showEntryAnimation, setShowEntryAnimation] = useState(true); const [unlockProgress, setUnlockProgress] = useState(0); const [isUnlocked, setIsUnlocked] = useState(false); const containerRef = useRef(null); // Entry animation effect useEffect(() => { if (showEntryAnimation) { const timer = setTimeout(() => { setShowEntryAnimation(false); }, 3000); return () => clearTimeout(timer); } }, [showEntryAnimation]); // Unlock progress effect useEffect(() => { if (unlockProgress < 100 && !isUnlocked) { const timer = setTimeout(() => { setUnlockProgress(prev => Math.min(prev + 10, 100)); }, 200); return () => clearTimeout(timer); } else if (unlockProgress === 100) { setIsUnlocked(true); } }, [unlockProgress, isUnlocked]); const caseData: CaseData[] = [ { title: 'CASE FILE #001', caseNumber: 'LF-2024-001', leftPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nCASE FILE #001 - LEFT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n Case Number: LF-2024-001 Date Filed: October 15, 2024 Status: ACTIVE BETWEEN: PETITIONER vs. RESPONDENT Prepared by: Adv. Ashish S Swar B.COM, LL.B, M.A Contact Information: Address: Ashish Swar Chambers 1st Floor, Cyber Square Purnea, Goa - 605112 Phone: 0832-2301572 Mobile: 9764921100 Email: ashishswar8@gmail.com CASE DETAILS: This legal proceeding pertains to a civil matter under the jurisdiction of the District Court. All parties involved have been properly notified of the proceedings and court orders. 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦, rightPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nCASE FILE #001 - RIGHT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n COURT INFORMATION: Court: District Court Judge: Hon'ble Justice Court Hall: A-3 Hearing Date: November 15, 2025 CASE SUMMARY: The petitioner filed this case on October 15, 2024, alleging breach of contract by the respondent. The matter involves a commercial dispute valued at Rs. 5,00,000 (Five lakhs). PREVIOUS PROCEEDINGS: Date: October 20, 2024 窶｢ First hearing conducted 窶｢ Both parties presented arguments 窶｢ Case posted for further hearing Date: October 25, 2024 窶｢ Interim relief granted 窶｢ Respondent ordered to deposit 50% NEXT HEARING: Date: November 15, 2025 Time: 10:00 AM Location: Court Hall A-3 STATUS: Active Proceedings COUNSEL: Adv. Ashish S Swar 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦 }, { title: 'CASE FILE #002', caseNumber: 'LF-2024-002', leftPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nPLEADING MEMORANDUM - LEFT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n Reference: Case #LF-2024-002 Prepared by: Adv. Ashish S Swar Date: October 18, 2025 FACTS OF THE CASE: 1. The petitioner is a natural person residing at the address mentioned in the petition. 2. The respondent, by his acts and omissions, has caused considerable damages to the petitioner's business interests. 3. All previous attempts at settlement have failed and this legal action is necessary for justice. 4. The matter involves a breach of contract dated June 15, 2024, wherein the respondent agreed to deliver goods/services. 5. The respondent failed to fulfill his obligations despite repeated reminders. 6. The petitioner has suffered both financial and reputational loss due to this breach. 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦, rightPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nPLEADING MEMORANDUM - RIGHT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n RELIEF SOUGHT: 1. Monetary compensation of Rs. 5,00,000/- (Five lakhs only) for damages suffered 2. Injunction restraining respondent from causing further violation 3. Interest on the claimed amount @ 12% p.a. from date of breach till date of payment 4. Cost of litigation including court fees and attorney charges 5. Any other relief deemed fit and proper by the Honourable Court JURISDICTION: This Court has territorial jurisdiction to entertain this petition as per Civil Procedure Code Section 13, 1908. SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS: 窶｢ Original Agreement (Exhibit A) 窶｢ Email Correspondence (Exhibit B) 窶｢ Bank Statements (Exhibit C) 窶｢ Photographs & Evidence (Exhibit D) 窶｢ Medical Reports (if applicable) 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦 }, { title: 'CASE FILE #003', caseNumber: 'LF-2024-003', leftPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nAFFIDAVIT - LEFT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n IN THE DISTRICT COURT In the matter of: Case #LF-2024-003 Deponent: Ram Kumar Singh Date: October 10, 2025 I, Ram Kumar Singh, son of Shri Hari Singh, aged 35 years, resident of Plot No. 123, Sector 5, New Delhi - 110001, do hereby solemnly affirm and state as follows: 1. That I am the petitioner in this case and am competent to make this affidavit. 2. That the facts stated herein are true to my knowledge and belief and nothing material has been concealed. 3. That the respondent has willfully violated the terms and conditions as agreed upon vide the agreement dated June 15, 2024. 4. That despite multiple notices and reminders, the respondent has failed to comply. 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦, rightPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nAFFIDAVIT - RIGHT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n 5. That I have suffered significant financial losses as a result of said violation amounting to Rs. 5,00,000/- (Five lakhs). 6. That all statements made herein are correct and authentic and I am ready to prove the same before the Honourable Court. 7. That I have not filed any other case against the respondent in any other court. DECLARATION: I hereby declare that what is stated above is true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief. I am making this affidavit for the purposes of justice and establishing my claim before this Honourable Court. Signed and sworn before me at New Delhi this 10th day of October, 2025. _______________________________ Signature of Deponent (Ram Kumar Singh) _______________________________ Signature of Notary Public Date: October 10, 2025 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦 }, { title: 'COURT ORDER', caseNumber: 'LF-2024-001', leftPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nCOURT ORDER - LEFT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n IN THE DISTRICT COURT [Court Address, Purnea] Case No.: LF-2024-001 Date: October 25, 2025 Hon'ble Justice (Name) Presiding Officer BETWEEN: Petitioner ............................ Appellant and Respondent ....................... Respondent ORDER: Upon hearing both the counsel for petitioner and respondent and perusing the documents on record, the Court hereby passes the following order: 1. The petition is admitted for hearing on merits and interim relief is granted. 2. Both parties are directed to file their detailed written submissions within 14 days from the date of this order. 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦, rightPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nCOURT ORDER - RIGHT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n 3. The respondent is directed not to cause any further harm or damage to the petitioner during the pendency of this case. 4. The respondent is also directed to deposit 50% of the claimed amount with the Court registry as an interim measure within 30 days from the date of this order. 5. Next hearing is scheduled for November 15, 2025 at 10:00 AM in Court Hall A-3. 6. The parties are directed to maintain status quo till the next hearing. 7. Both parties are directed to appear either personally or through authorized counsel on the date of next hearing. It is so ordered. _______________________________ (Signature) Hon'ble Justice Date: October 25, 2025 Seal of Court: _______________ 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦 }, { title: 'EVIDENCE SUMMARY', caseNumber: 'LF-2024-001', leftPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nEVIDENCE SUMMARY - LEFT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n Case File: LF-2024-001 Prepared by: Adv. Ashish S Swar Date: October 28, 2025 DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE: Exhibit A: Agreement dated June 15, 2024 窶｢ Original contract between parties 窶｢ Witnessed by two independent persons 窶｢ Notarized on June 20, 2024 窶｢ Value mentioned: Rs. 5,00,000/- 窶｢ Terms and conditions clearly stated Exhibit B: Communication Records 窶｢ Email correspondence (15 documents) 窶｢ WhatsApp chat logs (12 conversations) 窶｢ SMS records (8 messages) 窶｢ Registered letters (4 documents) 窶｢ All duly authenticated Exhibit C: Financial Records 窶｢ Bank statements (June-Oct 2024) 窶｢ Invoice copies (5 documents) 窶｢ Payment receipts (3 documents) 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦, rightPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nEVIDENCE SUMMARY - RIGHT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n Exhibit D: Photographs and Video 窶｢ Scene documentation (25 photos) 窶｢ Damage assessment (12 photos) 窶｢ Timestamp verification available 窶｢ Expert report attached ORAL EVIDENCE: Witness Statements: 窶｢ Witness 1: Business Associate 窶｢ Witness 2: Financial Advisor 窶｢ Witness 3: Independent Observer Expert Testimony: 窶｢ Chartered Accountant (Financial audit) 窶｢ Technical Expert (if required) CHAIN OF CUSTODY: All exhibits properly maintained and catalogued with proper chain of custody documentation as per law of evidence. Verified by: Adv. Ashish S Swar Court Seal: _______________ Date: October 28, 2025 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦 }, { title: 'CASE ANALYSIS', caseNumber: 'LF-2024-001', leftPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nLEGAL ANALYSIS - LEFT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n CASE ANALYSIS: LF-2024-001 - Breach of Contract I. LEGAL ISSUES: 1. Existence of valid contract 2. Breach of contractual obligations 3. Damages and compensation 4. Applicable legal provisions II. APPLICABLE LAW: 1. Indian Contract Act, 1872 窶｢ Sections 10, 20, 37, 56, 73 2. Specific Relief Act, 1963 窶｢ Sections 10, 14, 38 3. Limitation Act, 1963 窶｢ Article 54 - 3 years for contract suits III. PRECEDENTS: 1. Hadley v. Baxendale (1854) 9 Ex 341 - Rule of foreseeability of damages 2. Fateh Chand v. Balkishan Das, AIR 1963 SC 1405 - Principle of remoteness of damages 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊秦, rightPage: `笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申nLEGAL ANALYSIS - RIGHT PAGE 笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊申n IV. STRENGTHS OF CASE: 1. Written contract with clear terms 2. Multiple communication records 3. Financial documentation supporting claim 4. Photographs and evidence of breach 5. Expert testimony available V. WEAKNESSES OF CASE: 1. Delay in filing suit (if applicable) 2. Difficulty in proving exact quantum of damages 3. Potential counter-claims by respondent 4. Statute of limitations issues VI. STRATEGY: 1. Establish validity of contract 2. Prove breach through documentary evidence 3. Calculate precise damages with expert help 4. File interim applications for protection 5. Prepare for potential counter-claims VII. TIMELINE: 1. Next hearing: November 15, 2025 2. Written submissions due: November 8, 2025 3.
